label: Qualitative Expert Assessment
definition: Observation derived from expert qualitative judgment, analyst opinion, or focus-group-informed estimates

label: Document Review
definition: Observation extracted directly from the source document text through systematic review

label: Quantitative Survey
definition: Observation derived from structured quantitative survey data or statistical analysis

label: External Verification
definition: Observation verified through external sources, post-hoc research, or historical record to assess actual outcomes

label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of a strategic direction, market focus, or business approach described in the study

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Forward-looking prediction about market viability, adoption likelihood, or commercial feasibility

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified post-hoc result showing what actually happened after the study's predictions

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's capabilities, architecture, requirements, or readiness

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative benchmark measurement or performance comparison

label: Framework Factor
definition: A factor, dimension, or variable within an analytical framework proposed by the study

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative or semi-quantitative market size, revenue, unit, or share data

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative expert judgment, recommendation, or interpretive assessment
